scope: first three planning tasks from the pinned corpus
notes: This is a real measured pilot slice, not the final benchmark run artifact.
Time measurements come from local plan-change timing in the clean candidate worktree.
orientation_tokens_before_first_edit and full trustworthiness scoring are not captured here because this pilot did not run through a live agent-session token counter.
Use this pilot together with baseline-planning-pilot.json to calibrate full-run adjudication before filling results/candidate.json.

candidate_flow: node dist/cli/index.js plan-change "Split repo state evaluation away from runtime coordination in repo-manager"
notes: The contract returned both gold edit surfaces in one command.
It also included adjacent runtime-support surfaces and test-file recommendations, which improved context density but did not improve command-level test recall against the corpus gold.

candidate_flow: node dist/cli/index.js plan-change "Reduce authority concentration in Local Backend ranking and graph recovery"
notes: The contract anchored strongly on ranking support but still failed to surface the graph-support companion seam required by the corpus gold.
This task would still need another exploration pass before the planning result is complete.

candidate_flow: node dist/cli/index.js plan-change "Reduce truth-family concentration around call resolution in ingestion"
notes: The contract improved focus on call-processor but still did not surface the symbol-table companion seam required by the corpus gold.
The extra parsing and pipeline owners add context, but they are not sufficient to mark the planning task complete.
